review_title: Great tool for Business Owners!!!
description: As a small business owner I wanted to find a tool to track my employees hours, then I came across the ClockIn Portal. I was able to sign up within minutes and the process was quite easy. My employees receive credentials by email to log into their account and to Clock In and Clock Out. The reports that ClockIn Portal provide for my business are perfect and I'm able to use them to track miles, add hours and prepare for payroll. Right after I joined, they came out with an iOS and Android app which allowed my employees to easily Clock In from their phones. I love the fact that the ClockIn Portal support team is always available to answer all of your questions. After trying several different apps, ClockIn Portal stood out because it was easy to use for my employees and the Managers loved the reporting functionality. I would definitely recommend it to other business owners looking to track their employee work hours.
author: Nino S.
pros: -The ClockIn Portal support team is always available to answer all of your questions. -They came out with an iOS and Android app which allowed my employees to easily Clock In from their phones. -The reports that ClockIn Portal provide for my business are perfect and I'm able to use them to track miles, add hours and prepare for payroll.
author_profession: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best choice--and i looked at a lot of software options
description: makes tracking employee hours so easy. It's accurate, reliable, and affordable.
author: Anna M.
pros: I use this on a farm and I can tabulate hours and write paychecks without having to leave the office and track down paper logins. The reports are great for reviewing seasonal hours and projecting employee budgets for the upcoming season or preparing taxes at year end. When I'm out of town, I can make sure that employees are on the job at the time we agreed upon because I can see their log in remotely. Also, I like restricting log ins to a single device (on-farm tablet) so I can be sure the clock in and clock outs are occurring in real time at the farm and not on the drive home, etc.
cons: Not a major complaint, but the dashboard is not as intuitive as it could be. I have to fish around to remember how to find all shifts. Also, maybe a personal device issue or internet connection issue, but we have a few missed logins per month. And I don't mean employees forget to log in--but it's just not recorded on one or the other end of the day. Sometimes they end up with 23 hours of work in a day :) I can spot that and correct it easily though.

review_title: It was a great app
author: Ashley W.
pros: The speed of it was amazing. It was fast and prompt and it didn't take much time to operate. I didn't understand how to work it at first but I eventually figured it out.
cons: It was confusing to understand at first but I eventually got it. It was quite obvious that I need to brush up on my skills!

review_title: Simple time sheet app that allows my employees to track their work hours.
author: Helmy E.
pros: ClockIn Portal gives my employees mobile apps to track their work hours on the road without needing access to their PC, it also gives them the ability to report their mileage. My HR manager is able to generate the payroll reports she needs to input into our payroll system. ClockIn Portal gives us a web-based app that allows us to view a list of all users and to easily manage the entire process of edit requests and time sheets all online. My employees are able to clock in from their their web browser or smart phone and tracking all of their work hours has been a breeze. Definitely recommend this product if you are looking for a simple way for your employees to track their work hours.

review_title: Employee tracking for payroll purposes is simplified using clocking portal
description: ease of tracking employee time for payroll purposes.
author: Tracie J.
pros: I like that employee information can be added on a limited basis including wages and address information, it is important to me that overtime can also be calculated automatically.
cons: The limited availability of options and the difficulty in adjusting time cards for missed clock in or out and lunches for employees. Often forgets when we have clocked in or out causing the need for adjustments .

review_title: It's basic and to the point for a small business
description: I was able to keep track of my employees with out spending too much money.
author: Karen J.
pros: It's easy to use, both for the employer and employee. Employee is able to make change request to their time, when an error was made. It also shows you were they clocked in. This is extremely useful, when working in a manufacturing plant that doesn't allow the use of an app to clock in.
cons: You can not get 2 weeks of regular labor hours summed and OT hours summed, per person. It has to be done weekly.

review_title: Both our farm hands and our office workers use this application and we have been very happy with it!
description: This really streamlines our payroll process. We have farm hands and office workers and the farm hands are rarely in the office, so this helps us be able to quickly and efficiently receive and record their hours without the hassle of them needing to physically be present in the office.
author: Lauren S.
pros: Love the addition of the iPhone compatible application. Much easier to use for our manual labor-type and on the go employees to use.
cons: The main thing we wanted was an iPhone compatible app and that has been produced, so we don't have any other complaints/wishes at this time.

review_title: System is easy to use, but their customer support function lacks with the support. Sometimes silent
author: Lindsey E.
pros: Easy to use for all user types and pretty self explanatory. UX is simple but perfect for the purpose.
cons: Customer service doesn't respond to requests for support. We've emailed, called, and tried chat but received nothing in response. Have tried looking into canceling but can't get anyone to support us through the process.

review_title: Easy to use
author: Heba S.
pros: Clockin Portal is a very easy application that you can install on your smartphone, I liked how you can calculate your time at work with just a click of a button, and can easily submit unpaid lunch break.
cons: It can be better to add number of day in the sheet created by the application, so employee can easily check how many hours they did.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Keeping track of employee hours is a breeze
description: ClockIn Portal is a web app that allows me to track how many hours my employees work on a daily basis, the reports are easy to read and my bookkeeper uses them to process our payroll. ClockIn Portal is very affordable and gives me the peace of mind knowing that my employees are securely reporting their work times. Thank you to the ClockIn Portal development team for being so responsive to my feedback, we will be using this app for many years to come!
author: Helmy E.
pros: Easy to use online interface Reports for payroll Integration with Google Apps

review_title: Finger weg! Abzocke!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Das Programm ist stark limitiert, was auch gut sein kann.
cons: Auf Kunden wird nicht eingegangen. Der Support ist schlimm. Abo-Falle.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy to use.
author: James M.
pros: Didn't take forever to to learn and was easy to edit and send reports to the boss in easy text or email.
cons: It was dull and not detailed enough to get a good read of the hours that's I had worked. That was the bad

review_title: I really like how easy and intuitive the software is.
author: Stephen J.
pros: It's easy for owners and employees to use. I really like how I can easily generate reports for hours worked.

review_title: Great and easy to use
description: It helped keep track of employee hours
author: Traci M.
pros: This software was easy to install and easy to navigate through..i enjoyed and my employees enjoyed the software

review_title: ClockIn Portal Review
description: I am a small business owner. I was basically looking around for different ways to track when my employees clock in and out. I found ClockIn where I was able to sign up in minutes and soon after I signed up, they came out with the iOS app and Android app which makes it extremely easy for my employees to clock in and out. At only $4 per month per employee, it was the best decision I could have made as it is extremely cheap. I tried out other apps, but ClockIn really stood out to me because my employees were able to use it easily and the managers love the reporting functionality.
author: Ashley S.

review_title: Easy to use time clock software
description: Clockinportal is super intuitive that you would find your way through it without the need for someone to guide you through. It is a great tool for tracking team members' work time and view their status in real time. The reports we export at the end of the month help us with payroll and overtime processing. It is just a great attendance application.
author: Adrian M.

review_title: Perfect for what it does
author: Randy B.
pros: It is so easy for our employees to clock in and out. There is a lunch function too. The app will remind them if they forget to clock in or out. Our admin is able to make corrections as needed.
cons: It would be nice if we could keep track of PTO, holidays, sick days, etc with this app. Currently we have to use a separate spreadsheet for not. Not a deal breaker but it would be nice.

review_title: Overall, my experience has been fine. I do wish the software allowed for various reports to be added
author: Chanel P.
pros: Hard for new people to access the software unless you use a backdoor link. Limited Functions for independent contractors, notes that employees leave are lost once an approval is made of hours.
cons: Limited things that you can actually do within the software as it pertains to sick time, independent contractors, and wishing there was a group rate.

review_title: Great Choice for Small Business
author: John N.
pros: Billing is very straight forward. Setup is easy, user maintenance simple. Users find loging in and tracking their hours to be uncomplicated.
cons: Have not figured out how to have one individual "supervise" more than one group. may be me though.

review_title: Great product. Easy to use for both admins and employees.
author: Joe R.
pros: User interface, ease of use, simple design, and low monthly cost. This clock in software worked better than any other we had tried previously. It's a simple yet well designed platform that doesn't get in the way of itself.
cons: No customization. No ability to add tips. No ability to distinguish different departments for a singular employee. No ability to show prevailing wage payroll.

review_title: I enjoyed using this software. It made tracking employees clocking in, clocking out and break.
description: The benefit I got from this software is it lessened battles with employees about them clocking in or out on time and it helped to ensure employees from taking unauthorized breaks.
author: Cassandra D.
pros: What I liked the most about this software it is made my employees more productive because I was able to ensure everyone was where they were suppose to be and that they were working their entire shift and taking their breaks at the proper time
cons: There was not anything I did not like about the software. I think it was great. I would not change one thing about it.

review_title: Clockin Portal is very useful to our team and company.
description: Attendance tracking was much easier now that we are using this.
author: Maria Emmalie G.
pros: Very user friendly and the UI is easy on the eyes. I also like that it was very easy to set up and affordable.
cons: It goes down from time to time. We experienced it several times already and customer support is not easy to contact nor do they reply right away. It would also be great if they could make the lunch breaks accessible more than 4 times.

review_title: Overall, a great service for a handful of employees to clock in/out to record their hours.
description: no cons, If I had to include a con I would Wish it allowed for unlimited "lunch breaks" because a nursing mama working from home sometimes needs more than 5 breaks in a work day.
author: Sara A.
pros: Intuitive interface is attractive and easy to use. Off-site employees can access and use it just as easily as in-house workers.

review_title: Easy, simple and straightforward! Very user friendly.
author: Hollie S.
pros: I love using the app on my iPhone as well as logging in on my desktop. I also love being able to print off the reports at the end of each pay period when I calculate payroll for our small business.
cons: I wish that there was a way to use the app without using data. Some of our employees find themselves in low service areas and have trouble accessing the app to clock in/out when they are in the field.

review_title: Wonderful
author: Joel B.
pros: Easy to use for both myself and my employees. Allows for things to be restricted as needed, and the ability for employees to clockin in as needed. No complaints. It has really worked well for us and so currently no complaints on the service for the cost
cons: No complaints. It has really worked well for us and so currently no complaints on the service for the cost.
